stemHtml: The CG is at 25% MAC. Where is it located in relation to LEMAC and TEMAC?

options.a: 25% behind the Leading Edge of the Mean Aerodynamic Chord (LEMAC) and measured from LEMAC.
options.b: 25% forward of the Leading Edge of the Mean Aerodynamic Chord (LEMAC).
options.c: 25% behind the Trailing Edge of the Mean Aerodynamic Chord (TEMAC).
options.d: 25% forward of the Trailing Edge of the Mean Aerodynamic Chord (TEMAC).
